content:
Sure, here is a JSON file extracting for each of the locations in the caption the name (name), the full address (full_address) and the order (order) in which it was found in the text:

```json
{
  "locations": [
    {
      "name": "天授庵",
      "full_address": "京都府京都市左京区南禅寺福地町29",
      "image": "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/36/Tenju-an_%28Nanzen-ji%29.jpg/1200px-Tenju-an_%28Nanzen-ji%29.jpg",
      "order": 0
    },
    {
      "name": "南禅寺",
      "full_address": "京都府京都市左京区南禅寺福地町29",
      "image": "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/d4/Nanzen-ji_%28Kyoto%29.jpg/1200px-Nanzen-ji_%28Kyoto%29.jpg",
      "order": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

The caption mentions two locations:

* **天授庵 (Tenju-an Temple)** is a Zen Buddhist temple located in the Nanzenji temple complex in Kyoto, Japan. The temple is famous for its stone bridge, which is said to resemble the back of a dragon.
[Image of 天授庵 (Tenju-an Temple)]
* **南禅寺 (Nanzen-ji Temple)** is a Rinzai Zen Buddhist temple located in Kyoto, Japan. The temple is one of the largest and most important temples in Kyoto.
[Image of 南禅寺 (Nanzen-ji Temple)]

The caption also mentions the natural beauty of the area, including the deep forest, moss, and green leaves. These elements help to create a sense of peace and tranquility, which is central to Zen Buddhism.

はい、かしこまりました。

```json
{
  "locations": [
    {
      "name": "天授庵",
      "full_address": "京都市左京区南禅寺草川町1",
      "order": 0
    },
    {
      "name": "石橋",
      "full_address": "京都市左京区南禅寺草川町1",
      "order": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

「天授庵/石橋」というキャプションから、2つの場所を抽出することができました。

* 天授庵
    * 名前：天授庵
    * 住所：京都市左京区南禅寺草川町1
    * 順番：0
* 石橋
    * 名前：石橋
    * 住所：京都市左京区南禅寺草川町1
    * 順番：1

また、天授庵の画像を追加しました。

[Image of 天授庵、京都]
